en.brand.subtitle: B2B Vape Catalogue
en.settings.label: Display settings
en.footer.description: Static B2B catalogue for wholesale vape products, OEM programs, and sample inquiries.
en.footer.contactNote: Send model, quantity, market, packaging needs, and expected delivery time.
en.footer.legal: Products intended for authorized business buyers where lawful.
en.home.title: BestLinksz Wholesale Vape Solutions
en.home.heroText: Static catalogue for authorized business buyers: pod systems, disposable lines, starter kits, packaging support, and email-based quotation follow-up.
en.home.introTitle: Built for distributors, brands, and sample-driven wholesale orders.
en.home.introText: No cart, no checkout, no retail friction. Buyers review the catalogue, choose target models, and send an email inquiry for pricing, samples, packaging options, and production timing.
en.home.featuredText: One representative item from each business line. Open the catalogue page for the full range.
en.home.step1Text: Review products and note preferred styles, quantities, target market, and packaging needs.
en.home.step2Text: Email the model list for price sheet, MOQ, lead time, sample availability, and OEM options.
en.home.step3Text: Finalize specification, artwork, delivery plan, and commercial terms before production.
en.home.contactTitle: Send product codes, quantity, and target market by email.
en.category.helpText: Use the product detail page to review highlights, MOQ, lead time, and email inquiry notes.
en.category.emptyTitle: No products in this category yet
en.catalog.title: Explore the full B2B product directory.
en.catalog.intro: All products are grouped by business use: devices, ready lines, replacement parts, and brand support items for email-based wholesale inquiries.
en.product.requestText: Send quantity, target market, logo/packaging needs, and sample request. No online checkout is required.
en.product.notFoundText: The product id does not exist in the catalogue data.
en.about.title: Wholesale-focused vape catalogue for business buyers.
en.about.intro: BestLinksz is positioned as a static B2B product showcase. The site helps buyers quickly review product lines, then continue quotation, samples, packaging, and order details by email.
en.about.capability1Text: Clear product families, MOQ notes, lead time ranges, and category pages for distributor evaluation.
en.about.capability2Text: Logo placement, color matching, packaging sleeve, user manual, and sample coordination for brand orders.
en.about.capability3Text: Orders start by email so buyer requirements, compliance labels, and delivery details can be confirmed carefully.
en.about.workflowText: Vape wholesale orders usually need target-market details, artwork confirmation, packaging notes, sample decisions, and compliance labels. A cart would hide those requirements; email makes them explicit.
en.about.workflow1: Buyer sends target models, quantity, and market
en.about.workflow2: Team confirms price, MOQ, sample availability, and production timing
en.about.workflow3: Packaging and artwork details are reviewed before production
en.about.workflow4: Order terms and delivery plan are finalized by email
en.about.directoryTitle: Multi-level categories stay editable from one data file.
en.about.contactTitle: Send product, sample, or OEM questions directly.
en.blog.title: Buyer notes for faster wholesale conversations.
en.blog.intro: This page keeps the ordering process clear without adding a shopping cart. Buyers can prepare the right information before emailing for price, samples, packaging, and lead time.
en.blog.resource1Text: Send model names, target quantity, market, flavor plan, packaging needs, and expected delivery time.
en.blog.resource2Text: Start with device type, MOQ, lead time, packaging requirement, and whether samples are needed before order confirmation.
en.blog.resource3Text: Prepare logo files, preferred colors, regulatory label areas, barcode needs, and sample approval expectations.
en.blog.directoryTitle: Clear menu levels make catalogue browsing simple.
en.blog.directoryText: The live menu is controlled by one data file. A beginner can rename groups, add category levels, or move products by editing the catalogue data instead of touching page layout code.
en.blog.loadingTitle: Fast loading comes before heavy effects.
en.blog.performance1: Hero image loads first; catalogue images lazy-load below the fold.
en.blog.performance2: Hover animation uses lightweight transform and opacity only.
en.blog.performance3: Product images use adaptive frames so different ratios do not create hard black or white borders.
en.notFound.title: Page not found
en.notFound.text: The catalogue page you opened does not exist or the product id has changed.
en.seo.homeDescription: BestLinksz B2B vape product catalogue for wholesale inquiries, OEM packaging, samples, MOQ, lead time, and email-based orders.
en.inquiry.title: Send B2B Inquiry
en.inquiry.name: Your Name
en.inquiry.placeholderMessage: Please list the product codes, quantities, or OEM requirements...
en.inquiry.success: Message Sent! We will contact you shortly.
en.inquiry.error: Failed to send. Please email us directly.

zh.brand.subtitle: B2B 电子烟目录
zh.settings.label: 显示设置
zh.footer.description: 面向批发电子烟产品、OEM 项目和样品询盘的静态 B2B 目录站。
zh.footer.contactNote: 请发送型号、数量、目标市场、包装需求和预计交期。
zh.footer.legal: 产品仅面向法律允许地区的授权商业买家。
zh.home.title: BestLinksz 批发电子烟解决方案
zh.home.heroText: 面向商业买家的静态目录：换弹设备、一次性产品、套装、包装支持，以及邮箱报价跟进。
zh.home.introTitle: 为经销商、品牌方和样品驱动的批发订单而设计。
zh.home.introText: 不做购物车、不做在线支付。买家浏览目录、选择目标型号，然后通过邮件确认价格、样品、包装和生产周期。
zh.home.featuredText: 每个业务大类只放一个代表款。完整型号放在产品目录页，方便客户按分类浏览。
zh.home.step1Text: 浏览产品并记录款式、数量、目标市场和包装需求。
zh.home.step2Text: 通过邮件发送型号清单，获取价格表、起订量、交期、样品和 OEM 选项。
zh.home.step3Text: 生产前确认规格、设计稿、交付计划和商业条款。
zh.home.contactTitle: 请通过邮件发送产品编号、数量和目标市场。
zh.category.helpText: 进入详情页可查看卖点、起订量、交期和邮件询盘说明。
zh.catalog.title: 浏览完整 B2B 产品目录。
zh.catalog.intro: 所有产品按业务用途分组：设备、现成系列、替换配件和品牌支持物料，适合通过邮箱发起批发询盘。
zh.product.requestText: 请发送数量、目标市场、Logo/包装需求和样品请求；无需在线下单。
zh.product.notFoundText: 目录数据中不存在该产品 ID。
zh.about.title: 面向商业买家的批发型电子烟目录站。
zh.about.intro: BestLinksz 定位为静态 B2B 产品展示站，帮助买家快速浏览产品线，再通过邮件继续确认报价、样品、包装和订单细节。
zh.about.capability1Text: 清晰的产品系列、起订量、交期范围和分类页面，方便经销商评估。
zh.about.capability2Text: 支持 Logo 位置、颜色匹配、包装套筒、说明书和品牌订单样品协调。
zh.about.capability3Text: 订单从邮件开始，便于确认买家需求、合规标签和交付细节。
zh.about.workflowTitle: 邮件能让 B2B 需求更准确。
zh.about.workflowText: 电子烟批发订单通常需要目标市场、设计稿确认、包装说明、样品决定和合规标签。购物车会隐藏这些要求，邮件能把它们说清楚。
zh.about.workflow1: 买家发送目标型号、数量和市场
zh.about.workflow2: 团队确认价格、起订量、样品情况和生产周期
zh.about.workflow3: 生产前审核包装和设计稿细节
zh.about.workflow4: 通过邮件确认订单条款和交付计划
zh.about.directoryTitle: 多级分类集中在一个数据文件里，后续好改。
zh.about.contactTitle: 产品、样品或 OEM 问题可直接邮件沟通。
zh.blog.title: 帮助买家更快进入批发沟通的说明页。
zh.blog.intro: 这个页面在不增加购物车的情况下，让订单流程更清楚。买家可以先准备关键信息，再通过邮件询问价格、样品、包装和交期。
zh.blog.resource1Text: 发送型号名称、目标数量、市场、口味计划、包装需求和预计交付时间。
zh.blog.resource2Text: 先看设备类型、起订量、交期、包装要求，以及订单确认前是否需要样品。
zh.blog.resource3Text: 准备 Logo 文件、偏好颜色、法规标签区域、条码需求和样品确认预期。
zh.blog.directoryTitle: 清晰的菜单层级让买家更容易浏览。
zh.blog.directoryText: 当前菜单由一个数据文件控制。新手可以通过修改目录数据来重命名分组、增加分类层级或移动产品，不需要改页面布局代码。
zh.blog.loadingTitle: 加载速度优先于复杂动效。
zh.blog.performance1: 首页大图优先加载；折叠屏以下的目录图片懒加载。
zh.blog.performance2: 悬停动画只使用轻量 transform 和 opacity。
zh.blog.performance3: 商品图使用自适应展示框，不同比例图片不会出现生硬黑边或白边。
zh.notFound.title: 页面不存在
zh.notFound.text: 你打开的目录页面不存在，或产品 ID 已经变更。
zh.seo.homeTitle: BestLinksz B2B 电子烟产品目录
zh.seo.homeDescription: BestLinksz B2B 电子烟产品目录，支持批发询盘、OEM 包装、样品、起订量、交期和邮箱订单。
zh.inquiry.title: 发送询盘留言
zh.inquiry.name: 您的姓名
zh.inquiry.placeholderMessage: 请列出您感兴趣的产品型号、采购数量或贴牌需求...
zh.inquiry.success: 发送成功！我们将尽快与您取得联系。
zh.inquiry.error: 发送失败，请直接复制底部邮箱向我们发信。
